title: HARTRON Trainer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
org: Haryana State Electronics Development Corporation Ltd. (HARTRON)
shortInfo: The latest Haryana State Electronics Development Corporation Ltd. (HARTRON) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Trainer posts! Published on 20-05-2026 at hartron.in, this new recruitment drive offers 12 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the official age limit range and possessing a B.E. / B.Tech / M.Tech (Comp. Sc / IT) / M.Sc. (Comp. Sc / IT) / MCA with 60% marks and minimum 5 years relevant experience can apply online from 20-05-2026 to 29-05-2026. Find all details about the HARTRON Trainer 2026 new vacancy, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

basic_details.job_title: HARTRON Trainer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Haryana State Electronics Development Corporation Ltd. (HARTRON)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Haryana State Electronics Development Corporation Ltd. (HARTRON) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Trainer posts! Published on 20-05-2026 at hartron.in, this new recruitment drive offers 12 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the official age limit range and possessing a B.E. / B.Tech / M.Tech (Comp. Sc / IT) / M.Sc. (Comp. Sc / IT) / MCA with 60% marks and minimum 5 years relevant experience can apply online from 20-05-2026 to 29-05-2026. Find all details about the HARTRON Trainer 2026 new vacancy, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B. E. / B. Tech / M. Tech (Comp. Sc / IT) / M. Sc. (Comp. Sc. / IT) / MCA with 60% marks, Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in Software Development
qualification.details: .NET (MVC): B. E. / B. Tech / M. Tech (Comp. Sc / IT) / M. Sc. (Comp. Sc. / IT) / MCA with 60% marks and Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in the field of Software Development related to .net. Java (MVC): B. E. / B. Tech / M. Tech (Comp. Sc / IT) / M. Sc. (Comp. Sc. / IT) / MCA with 60% marks and Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in the field of Software Development related to Java. PHP (MVC): B. E. / B. Tech / M. Tech (Comp. Sc / IT) / M. Sc. (Comp. Sc. / IT) / MCA with 60% marks and Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in the field of Software Development related to PHP. Networking: B. E. / B. Tech / M. Tech (Comp. Sc / IT) / M. Sc. (Comp. Sc. / IT) / MCA with 60% marks, Certification in MCSE / CCNA / DCNE / Linux / Solaris and Minimum 5 years working experience related to network administration / handling, troubleshooting and resolving of operational issues of LAN / WAN / Internet / Intranet including hardware and system software. Web Designer: B. E. / B. Tech / Graduation with 60% marks, Certificate Course in Multimedia / Web Designing and Minimum 5 years experience related to web designing.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HARTRON to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HARTRON Trainer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the HARTRON Trainer recruitment is 29th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Trainer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies announced for the Trainer positions across various specializations like .NET (MVC), Java (MVC), PHP (MVC), Networking, and Web Designer.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for HARTRON recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for HARTRON Trainer recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official HARTRON website or use the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for HARTRON Trainer posts?
faq.answer: No, as per the official notification, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the HARTRON Trainer positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for these HARTRON positions?
faq.answer: The recruitment for Trainer posts at HARTRON is on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as specified by the corporation.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the selection process take place?
faq.answer: The selection process for the HARTRON Trainer recruitment will be conducted at either the IDDC Ambala centre or the HMSDC Gurugram centres. Candidates should be prepared to attend the selection at one of these locations.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website of HARTRON?
faq.answer: The official website of Haryana State Electronics Development Corporation (HARTRON) is hartron.org.in. All important updates and the application portal can be accessed through this website.

faq.question: Q8. When does the application period start?
faq.answer: The application period for the HARTRON Trainer recruitment begins on 20th May 2026. Candidates can start submitting their applications from this date onwards.

faq.question: Q9. Are there specific qualifications required for each Trainer post?
faq.answer: The official notification provides details on the specific qualifications required for each specialization of the Trainer post. It is crucial to refer to the PDF for precise educational and technical requirements.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this HARTRON Trainer recruitment drive is Hartron/ICTET/2026-27/02. This number should be used for any official correspondence or reference.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the HARTRON Trainer recruitment is 29th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.
